title: CTET September 2026 Online Form
short_info: Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE) has released the Central Teacher Eligibility Test CTET September 2026 Exam Notification. Those Candidates are Interested with CTET Can Apply Online from 11/05/2026 to 10/06/2026 .candidates should read the CTET 2026 information brochure for all the information related to the CTET exam like syllabus, eligibility, age limit, fees, Primary and Junior Level, information and other types of information and then apply. Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE) Central Teacher Eligibility Test CTET September 2026 CTET September 2026 Exam : Short Details of Notification
application_fee: For Single Paper : General / OBC / EWS: 1000 /- SC / ST / PH : 500/- For Both Paper Primary / Junior : General / OBC / EWS: 1200 /- SC / ST / PH : 600 /- Pay the Examination Fee Through Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking or E Challan CBSE CTET September 2026 Exam

tables.table_name: CBSE CTET September 2026 Exam Eligibility Code Details

text_sections.section: How to Fill CTET September 2026 Exam Online Form
text_sections.content: Central Board of Secondary Education CBSE Are Released the Central Teacher Eligibility Test CTET Paper I to V & VI to VIII Exam September 2026. Candidate Can Apply Online 11/05/2026 to 10/06/2026. | Note: This year the exam centers are limited in every city, the information of which will be seen live by the candidate while filling the form. All the candidates who want their nearest exam center / city should apply as soon as possible because the slots of the exam city are limited. | Candidate Read the Notification Before Apply the Teacher Eligibility Test Application Form in Central TET CTET Exam Latest Online Form for September 2026. | Kindly Check and Collect the All Document - Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details. | Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Recruitment Form - Photo, Sign, ID Proof, Etc. | Before Submit the Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Column Carefully. | If Candidate Required to Paying the Application Fee Must Submit.
